features.phoneAssistant: AI phone assistant automatically handles calls, appointments and inquiries – 24/7, reliable and brand-compliant.
features.chatbots: Intelligent chatbots & digital assistants answer customer inquiries on websites, social media and internal systems.
features.emailWorkflow: Email & workflow automation reduces manual work, accelerates processes and minimizes errors.

weAre.title: We are Reinke
weAre.paragraph1: We are engineers at heart - analytical, curious, precise. Our team of computer scientists, designers, strategists and AI experts develops digital solutions with depth. We combine research with practice, teaching with entrepreneurship and precision with humanity. For us, technology is not an end in itself, but a tool. It should solve problems, simplify processes and create added value - for people who want to make a difference.

howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.paragraph1: We look at every project from two perspectives: from the depth of the technology and with an eye on the big picture. Our way of working is characterized by clarity, pragmatism and responsibility.
howWeWork.paragraph2: We provide honest advice, make well-founded decisions and implement them - with a focus on what really helps the customer. Quick decisions, short paths and a consistently solution-oriented approach are part of our everyday work.
howWeWork.paragraph3: We work with modern tools and agile methods and focus on collaboration, personal responsibility and clear results.

values.heading: Our values
values.description: Our values shape the way we think and act - as a team, in cooperation with our customers and in every project.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We work in partnership, support each other, celebrate successes and overcome challenges together.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We embrace change, constantly learn as a team, and actively shape the future with cutting-edge AI solutions.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We think in terms of solutions, pragmatically and with precision, delivering exceptional quality in every project.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: We act on our own responsibility, make clear decisions, and stand by our results with integrity.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We build trust through transparency and shared responsibility, within our team and with every customer.

agility.title: Agility
agility.description: We work with modern tools and agile methods, focusing on collaboration, speed, and clear results.

description.p1: Behind Reinke are dedicated AI experts and software specialists who lead the company with trust, technical know-how and a shared understanding of responsibility and progress.
description.p2: Our founding team started in 2020 with a clear vision: to use technology intelligently to transform businesses. Since then, we have continuously expanded our expertise and built a talented team in Hamburg.
description.p3Line1: Today, we lead a growing team of AI specialists, software engineers and strategists – united by a clear vision:
description.p3Line2: To establish Reinke as a leading partner for AI-powered automation solutions.

eu.title: EU Dispute Resolution
eu.text: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
eu.note: You can find our email address in the legal notice above.

consumer.title: Consumer Dispute Resolution
consumer.text: We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

content.title: Liability for Content
content.text1: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages according to § 7 para.1 TMG under general laws. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, we are not obligated as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
content.text2: Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the time of knowledge of a concrete infringement.

links.title: Liability for Links
links.text1: Our offer contains links to external third-party websites, over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for these external contents. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.
links.text2: The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not recognizable at the time of linking. However, permanent monitoring of the content of the linked pages is not reasonable without concrete evidence of a violation.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.text1: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Duplication, processing, distribution, and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author or creator.
copyright.text2: Downloads and copies of this page are only permitted for private, non-commercial use.
copyright.text3: Insofar as the content on this page was not created by the operator, the copyrights of third parties are respected. In particular, third-party content is identified as such.

general.title: General Information
general.text: The following information provides a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit our website. Personal data is any data with which you can be personally identified. Detailed information on data protection can be found in our privacy policy listed below.

collection.title: Data Collection on Our Website
collection.q1: Who is responsible for data collection on this website?
collection.a1: Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. You can find their contact details in the
collection.q2: How do we collect your data?
collection.a2: On the one hand, your data is collected when you provide it to us. This can be, for example, data that you enter in a contact form. Other data is collected automatically by our IT systems when you visit the website. This is primarily technical data (e.g., internet browser, operating system, or time of page access). This data is collected automatically as soon as you enter our website.
collection.q3: What do we use your data for?
collection.a3: Part of the data is collected to ensure error-free provision of the website. Other data may be used to analyze your user behavior.
collection.q4: What rights do you have regarding your data?
collection.a4: You have the right to receive information about the origin, recipient, and purpose of your stored personal data free of charge at any time. You also have the right to request the correction or deletion of this data. For this purpose, as well as for further questions about data protection, you can contact us at any time at the address given in the legal notice. Furthermore, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

privacy.title: Data Protection
privacy.text1: The operators of these pages take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.
privacy.text2: When you use this website, various personal data is collected. Personal data is data with which you can be personally identified. This privacy policy explains what data we collect and what we use it for. It also explains how and for what purpose this happens.
privacy.note: Please note that data transmission over the Internet (e.g., when communicating via email) may have security vulnerabilities. Complete protection of data against access by third parties is not possible.

responsible.title: Note on the Responsible Party
responsible.text: The responsible party for data processing on this website is:
responsible.note: The responsible party is the natural or legal person who alone or jointly with others decides on the purposes and means of processing personal data (e.g., names, email addresses, etc.).

withdrawal.title: Revocation of Your Consent to Data Processing
withdrawal.text: Many data processing operations are only possible with your express consent. You can revoke consent you have already given at any time. For this purpose, an informal communication by email to us is sufficient. The legality of the data processing carried out until the revocation remains unaffected by the revocation.

complaint.title: Right to Lodge a Complaint with the Competent Supervisory Authority
complaint.text: In the event of violations of the GDPR, data subjects have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority, in particular in the member state of their habitual residence, their place of work, or the place of the alleged violation. The right to lodge a complaint exists without prejudice to any other administrative or judicial remedies.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text1: Our internet pages use so-called "cookies". Cookies are small text files and do not cause any damage to your device. They are stored either temporarily for the duration of a session (session cookies) or permanently (permanent cookies) on your device.
cookies.text2: Cookies have various functions. Many cookies are technically necessary because certain website functions would not work without them (e.g., the shopping cart function or the display of videos). Other cookies are used to analyze user behavior or display advertising.
cookies.highlight: You can set your browser so that you are informed about the setting of cookies and allow cookies only in individual cases, exclude the acceptance of cookies for specific cases or in general, and activate the automatic deletion of cookies when closing the browser. If cookies are deactivated, the functionality of this website may be restricted.

session.title: Session Cookies
session.text: Are automatically deleted after the end of your visit.

permanent.title: Permanent Cookies
permanent.text: Remain stored on your device until you delete them yourself.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.text: From third-party companies that enable certain services.

contactForm.title: Contact Form
contactForm.text1: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your information from the inquiry form, including the contact details you provided there, will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not pass on this data without your consent.
contactForm.text2: The processing of the data entered in the contact form is therefore based exclusively on your consent (Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. a GDPR). You can revoke this consent at any time. An informal communication by email to us is sufficient for this purpose.
contactForm.note: The data you enter in the contact form will remain with us until you request us to delete it, revoke your consent to storage, or the purpose for data storage no longer applies (e.g., after your request has been processed). Mandatory legal provisions – in particular retention periods – remain unaffected.

emailPhone.title: Inquiry by Email, Phone, or Fax
emailPhone.text1: If you contact us by email, phone, or fax, your inquiry, including all resulting personal data (name, inquiry), will be stored and processed by us for the purpose of processing your request. We do not pass on this data without your consent.
emailPhone.text2: The processing of this data is based on Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. b GDPR, if your request is related to the performance of a contract or is necessary for the implementation of pre-contractual measures. In all other cases, the processing is based on your consent (Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. a GDPR) and/or on our legitimate interests (Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR).
emailPhone.note: The data you send to us via contact requests will remain with us until you request us to delete it, revoke your consent to storage, or the purpose for data storage no longer applies (e.g., after your request has been processed). Mandatory legal provisions – in particular legal retention periods – remain unaffected.

googleFonts.title: Google Web Fonts
googleFonts.text1: This site uses so-called web fonts provided by Google for the uniform display of fonts. When you call up a page, your browser loads the required web fonts into its browser cache to display texts and fonts correctly.
googleFonts.text2: For this purpose, the browser you use must connect to Google's servers. This gives Google knowledge that our website was accessed via your IP address. The use of Google Web Fonts is in the interest of a uniform and appealing presentation of our online offerings.
googleFonts.moreInfo: Further information can be found at:

changes.title: 5. Changes to the Privacy Policy
changes.text: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy so that it always meets the current legal requirements or to implement changes to our services in the privacy policy, e.g., when introducing new services. The new privacy policy will then apply to your next visit.

questions.title: 6. Questions to the Data Protection Officer
questions.text: If you have questions about data protection, please write us an email or contact the person responsible for data protection in our company directly:
